since_last: 52% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.80%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +0.06% · Gold +0.16% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 52% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.80%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.80%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.90%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +17.19%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +17.19%, QCOM +9.39%, ARM +6.94%, AMAT +6.91%, LRCX +6.60%. Laggards: BABA -2.86%, DELL -2.03%, APP -1.95%, PLTR -1.76%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.99% at $157.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.99% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
